---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Daily Doom
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Problem:**
A clear description of the bug.

**Current Behavior:**
What happens now.

**Expected Behavior:**
What should happen instead.

**Steps to Reproduce:**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Environment:**
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- FPS observed: [e.g. 60]

**Screenshots:**
If applicable, add screenshots.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Bug is fixed
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] New test added to prevent regression

**Priority:** [Low / Medium / High / Critical]

**Files likely affected:** [e.g. `renderer.js`, `enemy.js`]
